creator: rm@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #7)
Actually, in 2018Q4 we have version 0.19.2 of scikit-learn, that's not affected to this breakage. Incompatible change was introduced into 0.20.1.

So I think it's not deserves mfh. New version will be rolled automatically in 2019Q1 soon anyway.
